mapper.select: select * from investment_types order by created_at desc, id desc
select name from investment_types where active = 1 order by created_at desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into investment_types (name, risk_level, sort_order, remark, active) values (#{name}, #{riskLevel}, 100, #{remark}, true)
mapper.update: update investment_types set name = #{name}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, remark = #{remark}, active = true where id = #{id}
